text: Dost ki shaadi miss ho gayi kyunki Bapu ki caregiving se itni thakan thi, par asli wajah wo dimaagi bimari ki goliyaan hain jo main office ke drawer mein chhupata hoon. Agar parivaar ko pata chala toh unka bharosa toot jayega aur log kahenge ki ghar ka mukhiya hi 'pagal' ho gaya hai. Main 'kuch nahi hone dunga' ka mask pehan kar bas thakan ka bahana banata hoon taaki ghar ki izzat aur shanti bani rahe.

Shaadi mein na ja paane par sabne poocha toh maine bas 'business tension' bol diya, kyunki main nahi chahta ki bacchon ko pata chale ki unka baap depression se lad raha hai. Main apni antidepressants ki strip car ke dashboard mein chhupata hoon taaki patni ko dukh na ho aur ghar mein kalesh na shuru ho jaye. Family head hone ke naate mera farz hai ki main sabka bojh uthau, bhale hi andar se main khatam ho raha hoon.

Caregiving burnout ne mujhe itna nichod diya hai ki main bed se uth nahi paaya, par parivaar ke samne yahi bola ki 'viral bukhar' hai. Main depression word use nahi kar sakta kyunki samaj mein ise kamzori mana jata hai aur main nahi chahta ki meri beti ke rishte par koi aanch aaye. Khandaan ki shaan bachane ke liye main apni mental health neglect karta hoon aur chup-chap andhere mein goliyaan kha leta hoon.

Jab dosto ne shaadi ki photos bheji toh mera dum ghutne laga, par maine bas 'hospital ka kharcha' aur thakan ka bahana banakar phone rakh diya. Main nahi chahta ki ghar walon ko meri halat ka ehsas ho warna wo sab darr jayenge aur ghar ka mahaul kharab ho jayega. Ek mard aur breadwinner hone ke naate mujhe hamesha sakht dikhna padta hai taaki 'log kya kahenge' wali baat na ho.

Shaadi miss hone par jab Mummy ne poocha toh maine bas 'sar dard' ka natak kiya, kyunki main nahi chahta ki unhe pata chale ki unka beta dimaagi taur par bimar hai. Joint family mein mukhiya ka tootna sabke liye qayamat jaisa hoga, isliye main apni sacchai daba raha hoon. Main apni antidepressants ki prescription phaar kar phenk deta hoon taaki ghar ki 'maryada' aur unka mujh pe garv bana rahe.
